choices.name: Confirmation
choices.choiceText: I confirm the worker I am supplying is fully compliant and is able to work all the shifts listed above

Flow.description: Allows suppliers to view bookings and apply candidates to shifts
Flow.label: VMS - Supplier - Booking Screen

fields.name: Shifts_0
fields.fieldText:
Confir﻿mation


Name: {!Job_Order_Loop.Name}

Site: {!Job_Order_Loop.Site_Text__c}

Worker: {!Worker_Loop.Name}

Worker NI: {!Worker_Loop.sirenum__National_Insurance__c}


Shifts:

fields.name: Worker_Text_0_0
fields.fieldText:
New Worker


Error!


The national insurance number matches another worker, details below:


Worker Name: {!NI_Check_Loop.Name}

Worker NI: {!NI_Check_Loop.sirenum__National_Insurance__c}

Worker DOB: {!NI_Check_Loop.Birthdate}

fields.name: Ongoing_Jobs_0
fields.fieldText:
Open Bookings


There are currently no Open Bookings

fields.name: Shifts
fields.fieldText:
Open Bookings


Name: {!Job_Order_Loop.Name}

Site: {!Job_Order_Loop.Site_Text__c}

fields.name: View_Fee_breakdown
fields.helpText: This will show you a breakdown of how Blue Arrow calculates the bill rate

fields.name: Fee_Breakdown_Text
fields.fieldText:
Minimum Worker Pay Rate : £{!Job_Order_Loop.Minimum_Wage__c}


Total Supplier Fee: {!TotalSupplierFee}

fields.name: Fee_Breakdown_Text2
fields.fieldText: Blue Arrow Management Fee : {!Management_Fee}

fields.name: Fee_Breakdown_Text3
fields.fieldText: Hourly Self Bill Rate: {!Total_Invoice_Formula}

fields.name: Summary_Text
fields.fieldText:
Confirmation


Name: {!Job_Order_Loop.Name}

Site: {!Job_Order_Loop.Site_Text__c}

Worker: {!Worker_Loop.Name}

{!Created_Shift_Count} Shifts have been created successfully!

fields.name: Worker_Text
fields.fieldText: Open Bookings

fields.name: Create_New_Worker
fields.helpText:
Ticking this box will take you through the process of creating a new worker.


Please confirm the worker does not exist in the table below first!

validationRule.errorMessage: Please enter a valid NI number with no spaces

fields.name: Please_confirm_the_worker_has_a_legal_right_to_work_in_the_UK
fields.fieldText: Please confirm the worker has a legal right to work in the UK
